summary: Confirmed fix: modify densityIntermediateMCS to use density_frame_condition_reflexive_source when source is reflexive. Requires moving strict lemma from CantorApplication.lean to DensityFrameCondition.lean first.

artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing density frame condition variants and implementation plan for strict intermediate construction

key_findings: density_frame_condition Case B1 can return endpoint (W = M') when target is reflexive
density_frame_condition_reflexive_source guarantees strictness from target when SOURCE is reflexive
Need to move density_frame_condition_reflexive_source from CantorApplication.lean to DensityFrameCondition.lean to avoid circular import
Implementation requires conditional dispatch based on source reflexivity
Downstream theorems (dense_timeline_has_intermediate) will automatically gain strictness property
